headlines.description: Bayern Munich had little trouble beating lowly Heidenheim 4-0 on Saturday to put themselves within touching distance of the Bundesliga title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern have 34th title in sight after comfy 4-0 win

video.headline: Joshua Kimmich adds fourth goal to extend Bayern's cushion
